sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement documentation available for this NES beat-em-up

special_mechanics.name: Ninja Arts / Ninjutsu Abilities
special_mechanics.description: Special powers acquired after beating levels. Player can choose which power to use by pressing Start. Powers help defeat enemies and bosses more quickly.

physics_values.notes: Final boss requires defeating with four specific Ninja Arts in a precise order. Different directional inputs used between Japanese and international versions.

special_mechanics.name: Jumping
special_mechanics.description: Core movement mechanic. Player can jump to reach higher areas and avoid obstacles.

physics_values.notes: Japanese version features zoom upward sprite animation on jump; removed in international version

special_mechanics.name: First-Person Perspective Segment
special_mechanics.description: Part of the final level shown through first-person perspective during level progression.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative only. No technical movement documentation available in sources. Game is a beat-em-up with platform elements, not a pure platformer. Sources document gameplay features, level design, and regional differences, but contain no physics parameters, sub-pixel data, or numerical movement values.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Wrath of the Black Manta article
Wikipedia - Wrath of the Black Manta article
